home.name: Evyatar Hazan
home.subtitle: AI & Automation Engineer | Full Stack Developer specializing in

about.p1: Hello! I'm Evyatar, an AI-focused Automation & Full Stack Developer based in Israel. I specialize in designing scalable systems, intelligent workflows, and user-facing technology.
about.p2: In my recent roles as an Automation Architect and Full Stack Tech Lead, I have designed scalable automation frameworks for iOS, Android, and Web, and integrated AI-based computer vision models to dynamically detect UI elements. I have also led development teams in building robust React Native platforms, architecting frontend infrastructures, and establishing efficient CI/CD lifecycles.
about.p3: I am passionate about the practical adoption of LLM technologies, improving AI system quality, and delivering pixel-perfect, intuitive applications.

password_gen.title: Password Generator
password_gen.description: A React Native application that locally generates highly secure deterministic passwords from a simple two-word input without collecting or storing any data.

ai_automation.title: AI Computer Vision Automation
ai_automation.description: Integrated YOLO computer vision models to dynamically detect UI elements in mobile applications, significantly improving cross-platform testing resilience.

spool.title: Collaborative Travel Platform
spool.description: Designed frontend architecture in React Native and implemented a complex trip distribution algorithmic engine handling real-time data flow.

contact.subtitle: I'm currently looking for new opportunities. Whether you have an inquiry regarding LLM workflows, automation, or frontend architecture, I'll try my best to get back to you!
contact.getInTouchDesc: Fill out the form and I'll be in touch as soon as possible.
